---
title: "Caroline Jeannette (or Janetta) Beck"
---

## Caroline Jeannette (or Janetta) Beck

**Dates:** (Launceston 1819/20-1891)

**Maiden name:** (Bignell)

### Description

stepmother of Gertrude Walter and Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

She married first (1853) Lieut-Colonel Edward Walter (1804-10 Dec 1862),  and secondly (1867), the Rev. James Beck (b.1819/20), Rector of Parham and then of Bildeston.

### Letters

- Letter from July 29th [1885?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from June 1st 1876
- Letter from April 25th [1872-1891]
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from September 10, 1858.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
